arts.ttl: Michael Owen has theory on how Liverpool managed to capture Federico Chiesa in cut-price deal
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa completed a move to Liverpool from Juventus before transfer deadline day and Michael Owen has backed the Italian to be a success at Anfield.

arts.ttl: ‘From what I hear…’: Former PL star shares information regarding Van Dijk’s Liverpool future
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk will be out of contract next summer and there have been rumours of a potential contract extension. Liverpool are yet to tie him down to a new long-term deal, but former Premier League goalkeeper Paul Robinson believes that the extension is only a matter of time. arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Wolves vs Liverpool kicks off at 5.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 5pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Liverpool is also being provided on Saturday evening as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: ‘Impossible’: Luis Diaz can’t believe what he’s now heard about Federico Chiesa at Liverpool
arts.sum: The new season is underway, and that means that the new EA FC 25 game has also just released. Football fans across the globe will...

arts.ttl: Six players to miss Wolves vs Liverpool with one major doubt as Arne Slot advantage clear
arts.sum: Liverpool are back in action on Saturday evening (5.30pm) with a trip to Wolves in the Premier League as Arne Slot's side look to continue their good run of form.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd join Williams race; Liverpool eye Pulisic as Salah replacement
arts.sum: Chelsea are prepared to pay over €120m (£100.3m) to sign Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni, who is also of interest to Manchester City following Rodri's injury. RB Leipzig centre-back Castello Lukeba is attracting significant interest from across Europe, with Aston Villa and Newcastle United joining a list of suitors that already includes Chelsea and Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve got a source…’: Pundit reveals what he has heard about Liverpool star’s future
arts.sum: Liverpool attacker Mohamed Salah has been linked with a move away from the club in recent months. The 32-year-old will be a free agent in the summer of 2025 and former Premier League striker Gabriel Agbonlahor has now revealed that the player will be heading to Saudi Arabia at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Nuri Sahin's savage Brendan Rodgers verdict after Dortmund boss accused Celtic manager of wrecking Liverpool loan spell
arts.sum: The two will go head to head in Germany on Tuesday but didn't have the best time when they worked together on Merseyside

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Reds, meanwhile, continued to enjoy their positive start under new manager Arne Slot by thrashing West Ham United 5-1 in the Carabao Cup. With Luis Diaz, Mohamed Salah, Diogo Jota and Cody Gakpo all among the goals recently, Saturday presents a monstrous challenge for Wolves and O'Neil. Liverpool will aim to keep pressure on Premier League leaders Manchester City when they visit Wolves in Saturday's evening kick-off.

arts.ttl: Man City hatch £30m transfer plan to sign Rodri replacement – and it's great news for Liverpool
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi has been compared to Rodri in the past, but Manchester City have left the door wide open for Liverpool to sign the Real Sociedad star
